svg.desc: Component: Sessions page — grid/list view toggle Page: Sessions (/sessions) Design system version: 3.14 (2026-03-25) Artboards: desktop 1280px (two frames: grid view + list view), mobile 390px (list view, 3 cols) Bug: BUG-02 — Sessions page: grid/list view toggle
svg.text: BUG-02 — Sessions page: grid/list view toggle — Left frame: grid view (LayoutGrid active). Right frame: list view (LayoutList active). Third frame: mobile 390px list view.
overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-zinc-200 — 5 columns: Name | Model | State | Updated | Actions
LayoutList button: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 (active) — LayoutGrid: text-zinc-500 (inactive)
Row hover: hover:bg-zinc-50 cursor-pointer — h-14 row height — text-sm
h-8 (32px) — page header control context, not sticky bar. WCAG 2.5.8 AA (24px) met.

g.text: flex-wrap gap-2 — controls drop to second line at sm breakpoint
Mobile: show Name + State + Actions only.
Updated column also hidden on mobile — omitted for viewport fit.
h-8 w-8 ghost icon buttons — Archive + Trash2 per normal row.
Col widths: Name (flex-1) — State (w-24) — Actions (w-20, text-right)
Table: rounded-xl border border-zinc-200 full-width — text-sm rows
